flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Florida Panhandle Technical College fell 55% between 2021 and 2024 (347 → 157).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 39% at Florida Panhandle Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (201 vs 330).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Florida Panhandle Technical College fell 37% between 2021 and 2024 (80.8% → 51.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 22 pp at Florida Panhandle Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (41.8% vs 63.7%).
